title: when tony speaks in pure mafia code
description: Tony and Ralph’s conversation about Jackie Jr. sounds calm on the surface, but underneath it, they are deciding who has to carry the death sentence. In this video, I translate the mafia language in the scene and break down how Tony gives Ralph the message without ever saying it directly.
